commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f1892a3b7ef5b6bbccdec5f1868dc9d74c5fb93b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a default-level warning before `sendCompactionNotice` returns when no `onBlockReply` stream is available.

PR surface: Source +9. Total +9 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current `main` returns before delivering a compaction notice when `onBlockReply` is missing, while docs say `notifyUser` sends start/end notices. I did not run a live compaction path in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to decide whether a log-only mitigation should merge and ensure contributor-supplied real runtime proof is added; automation cannot supply that proof for the contributor.

target.title: fix(compaction): log when compaction notice is skipped due to missing block-reply stream
target.author: chengzhichao-xydt

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
